moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Looms
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America culminates with the final match on Sunday, July 19th, after semifinals today and tomorrow.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just four days until the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Who are you backing to lift the trophy this Sunday?

angles.name: Semifinal Buzz
angles.copy: The World Cup semifinals are LIVE today and tomorrow! Who's making it to the final? Tell us your predictions!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, running until July 19th.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: The final men's major of the year, The Open Championship, starts tomorrow at Royal Birkdale! Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is primed for The Open Championship this weekend. Expect incredible golf and classic links drama!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is happening now in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, running from July 15th-18th.

angles.name: Island Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is bringing incredible music and culture to Stornoway this week! Who's there?

angles.name: Scottish Sounds
angles.copy: Live from the Outer Hebrides! Hebcelt is in full swing, celebrating Scottish and international talent.

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Hurrah
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival returns for its final edition this weekend, July 18th-19th, at Wollaton Hall in Nottingham, promising a memorable send-off.

angles.name: Last Chance for Splendour
angles.copy: This is it! Splendour Festival's final ever weekend kicks off Saturday at Wollaton Hall. Don't miss out on history!

angles.name: Nottingham's Farewell Festival
angles.copy: Nottingham prepares to say goodbye to Splendour Festival this weekend. Who's got their tickets for the last dance?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Celebrates 20 Years
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd-26th, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Latitude at 20
angles.copy: Happy 20th Anniversary, Latitude! The festival kicks off next week with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi leading the charge.

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready for Latitude Festival! Who are you most excited to see next weekend?

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games 2026 are set to begin in Glasgow, Scotland, on July 23rd, running until August 2nd.

angles.name: Glasgow Gets Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games next week! Excitement is building across Scotland.

angles.name: Sporting Action Ahead
angles.copy: From July 23rd, the Commonwealth Games bring elite sport to Glasgow. Who's watching?

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Finale Approaching
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated finale of Love Island 2026 is expected to air on Monday, July 27th, after eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Love Island Final Week
angles.copy: The Love Island 2026 finale is just around the corner! Who do you want to see crowned the winners?

angles.name: Villa Drama Peaks
angles.copy: With the finale in sight, the drama in the Love Island villa is hitting new heights. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: School summer holidays begin across much of the UK this week and next, with Wales starting July 20th and England from July 22nd.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Wishing all students across the UK a fantastic, well-deserved break.

angles.name: Summer Plans
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially beginning for many! What are your big plans for the next few weeks?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May turns 79 on July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Iconic guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana! What's the first song that comes to mind when you hear his name?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer Don Henley turns 79 on July 21st.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Sending Happy 79th Birthday wishes to the legendary Don Henley of The Eagles! Which Eagles track is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez! Celebrating her biggest hits today.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic guitarist Slash turns 61 on July 23rd.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: JLo's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 57th Birthday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez! Get ready to dance to her biggest hits.
